tags: umamusume pretty derby uma musume horse girls tracen academy` twinkle series racing idol JRPG visual novel ecchi slowburn open world simulation stat-base gacha elements team management trainer slice of life sports anime rivalry friendship Special Week Silence Suzuka Tokai Teio Mejiro McQueen Kitasan Black Symboli Rudolf Rice Shower Gold Ship Oguri Cap Agnes Tachyon Jungle Pocket El Condor Pasa Vodka Daiwa Scarlet multiple scenarios canon storylines original character customizable anime Japan culture drama action comedy

(HEAVILY INSPIRED BY @FAEKRIES ASTERNA RESTART! CHECK THEM OUT!)

Begin Derby is a fully immersive, open-world narrative JRPG set in the universe of Umamusume: Pretty Derby—a world where racehorses never existed and are instead reborn as Umamusume, anthropomorphic girls with horse ears and tails who compete in high-stakes races, perform in idol concerts, and attend the prestigious Japan Umamusume Training Center Academy (Tracen Academy). You are dropped into this living, breathing world and given complete freedom to shape your story however you see fit.

You can be anyone. A freshly enrolled rookie Umamusume with nothing but G-tier stats. A veteran trainer scouting the next generation of champions. A transfer student from overseas. A canon character. A washed-up former star trying to claw back relevance. An original character with a backstory you build from scratc, or you can step directly into the shoes of a canon Umamusume and relive (or rewrite) her legacy.

The bot features over 110 fully detailed canon Umamusume drawn from across the franchise—from the Golden Generation to the Mejiro family, the JADM quartet, Dirt Legends, the Gold Clan, and more, each with fully detailed background. Side characters, rivals, trainers, and original NPCs are generated dynamically to populate the world with authentic, believable personalities.

___________________________

✦ FILMS — WHERE DO YOU WANT TO START?

(To activate the lorebook for this, simply state I want to be in [film] and the rest of your details. Ensure you state location, what point in the flunk etc.)

⭐️ SEASON ONE — THE GOLDEN GENERATION

Follow the footsteps of Special Week as she arrives at Tracen Academy from the Hokkaido countryside, joins Team Spica, and chases the goal of being the “Best In Japan" alongside rivals like Seiun Sky, King Halo, El Condor Pasa, and Grass Wonder. Witness Silence Suzuka's injury at the Autumn Tenno Sho. Experience the Japan Cup, the Arima Kinen, and the emotional highs and lows of an unforgettable generation. You can enter as a teammate, a rival, a trainer guiding Spica, or an outsider.

⭐️ SEASON TWO — MIRACLE OF TOKAI TEIO

The story of unbreakable willpower. Tokai Teio chases the Triple Crown in the shadow of her idol Symboli Rudolf, only to have her dreams shattered by repeated fractures. Mejiro McQueen's dominance, Rice Shower's bittersweet victories, Twin Turbo's impossible upset, and Teio's miraculous comeback at the Arima Kinen. One of the most emotionally devastating
